Convert a named list of vectors to a data frame

Source: R/interp.R
named_list_to_df.Rd

Convert a named list of vectors to a data frame

Usage

named_list_to_df(named_list, col_names = c("name", "value"))

Arguments

named_list

named list of vectors, where each vector represents a set of values for a given name

col_names

character vector of column names for the resulting data frame. Default is c("name", "value"), where "name" is the name of the list element and "value" is the value of the list element.

Value

data frame with two columns ("name" and "value" by default) where each row represents a name-value pair from the input list. The function ensures that the resulting data frame is unique and sorted by name.

On this page

energyRt
